name: Choose laboratory test (search and select)
pageTitle: Choose Lab Test - Import and export applications - GOV.UK
caption: CHEDD.GB.2026.1526057 - V1
heading: CHEDD.GB.2026.1526057 - V1 Laboratory tests
journeyContext: Decision / BCP-inspector phase (NOT the notifier journey). Driven by workflow recordDecisionForChedDNotification: Decision hub 'Laboratory tests' link -> Lab tests intro (radio Yes) -> Lab tests commodity select (Select link) -> THIS page (search + choose test) -> Lab tests commodity sample -> Record laboratory test information -> Lab tests review. Cited: ched-d-workflows.ts:410-449.

Empty-state cell (colspan=3) shown when the filtered search returns zero rows OR when the query failed validation (payloadCleaner strips the invalid criterion and laboratoryTests.content is undefined). No trace rendered this state. Corroborated by handler test choose_lab_test_test.js:207-213 (over-length search name -> laboratoryTests undefined).

Body (govuk-body) — the commodity code being tested
Label (govuk-label govuk-label--s) for the free-text search input

structure.text: Columns: Laboratory test | Laboratory test category | Select test (visually hidden). Each row ends in a Select link.

structure.govukComponent: Body (govuk-body) containing a govuk-link back to the CHED hub

Groups the three filter controls (Search, category, subcategory) under the 'Filter' legend
Labels for Search, Laboratory test category, Laboratory test subcategory
Free-text laboratory test name search (id laboratory-test-name)
govukComponents.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 126; corroborated by page object LabTestsCommodityTestPage.ts:6-8 (inputSearch = getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Search' }))

govukComponents.usage: Laboratory test category (6 options) and subcategory (45 options) filters. NB: no page object or test drives these selects — the tests filter only via the free-text Search box (LabTestsCommodityTestPage.ts exposes inputSearch + btnSearch only). Trace-only surface.

govukComponents.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 126; corroborated by page object LabTestsCommodityTestPage.ts:10-12 (btnSearch = getByRole('button', { name: 'Search' }))

govukComponents.usage: Results grid of matching laboratory tests, aria-label 'choose lab test table', one Select link per row
govukComponents.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 126; result rows trace b3742f19b6eea5d9285f5c8739571523a0a13ec1 action 133

govukComponents.usage: 25 per-row 'Select' links (id choose-laboratory-test-{n}) on the unfiltered results page 1, each advancing to the applicant-information page for that test; plus the 'Cancel' link back to the CHED hub. Row count per page is the page size, not a fixed total (114 pages unfiltered).
govukComponents.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 126 before-snapshot (25 anchors with id^=choose-laboratory-test-; Cancel href .../hub); row id/href confirmed at trace b3742f19b6eea5d9285f5c8739571523a0a13ec1 action 133 (id=choose-laboratory-test-0, href .../lab-test/0/1541/applicant-information); corroborated by page object LabTestsCommodityTestPage.ts:14-16 (linkboxChooseLaboratoryTest(index) = #choose-laboratory-test-{index})

govukComponents.usage: Page layout; the three filter fields sit in one-third columns
Screen-reader-only 'Select test' column header and ':' in pagination

nonStandardPatterns.whatItDoes: Bespoke pagination control ('Next page : 2 of 114') for the multi-page laboratory test catalogue (114 pages when unfiltered). Uses a hand-rolled SVG arrow icon and ?page=N query links.
nonStandardPatterns.concern: Not the GOV.UK Design System pagination component (govuk-pagination). Custom class namespace and markup; the new app should not copy it.
nonStandardPatterns.govukAlternative: govuk-pagination (Pagination component) — supports previous/next and numbered pages out of the box.

nonStandardPatterns.whatItDoes: Custom wrapper div around the filter fieldset (search + two category selects + Search button).
nonStandardPatterns.concern: Non-govuk class; purely a layout container. No Design System equivalent needed — a govuk-grid-row / govuk-form-group arrangement covers it.
nonStandardPatterns.govukAlternative: Standard fieldset + grid columns (already largely present); drop the bespoke wrapper class.

nonStandardPatterns.whatItDoes: Custom modifier class applied alongside govuk-table on the results grid.
nonStandardPatterns.concern: Bespoke styling hook on top of a standard govuk-table; behaviourally standard. Low concern.
nonStandardPatterns.govukAlternative: govuk-table alone (with govuk-!-width-full) — no custom class required.

nonStandardPatterns.whatItDoes: Custom class on a span wrapping the CHED reference number (#reference-number) and version (#cved-version-number) INSIDE the H1 — i.e. the page's version caption, not a standalone sub-heading.
nonStandardPatterns.concern: Non-govuk class used to render an inline caption within the H1. The reference/version is display-only context sourced from the notification.
nonStandardPatterns.govukAlternative: govuk-caption-xl above the H1 (GOV.UK caption pattern), or leave the reference in the H1 without the bespoke class.
nonStandardPatterns.evidence:
trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 126 H1 outerHTML:

CHEDD.GB.2026.1526057 - V1Laboratory tests

nonStandardPatterns.pattern: Search-and-select-then-navigate pattern (no radio/checkbox selection; each result row is a direct 'Select' link)
nonStandardPatterns.whatItDoes: Choosing a lab test is done by clicking a per-row link that immediately GETs the applicant-information page for that test id, rather than selecting an option and submitting a form.
nonStandardPatterns.concern: Not a form submission of a chosen value — it is a navigation link per row. For a rebuild this is a legitimate GOV.UK pattern (link in a table cell) but note there is NO server-side 'you must choose a test' validation surface because selection == navigation.
nonStandardPatterns.govukAlternative: Acceptable as-is (govuk-link in govuk-table cell); alternatively a radios + Continue pattern if a review step is wanted.
nonStandardPatterns.evidence: trace b3742f19b6eea5d9285f5c8739571523a0a13ec1 action 133 (Click #choose-laboratory-test-0 → govuk-link anchor, href .../lab-test/0/1541/applicant-information, a straight GET with no form submit). NB action 130 in the same trace is the PREVIOUS commodity-select page's 'Select' link (id choose-commodity-0, navigates INTO this page), not a lab-test selection. Corroborated by the test drive order in ched-d-workflows.ts:420-422 (inputSearch.fill -> btnSearch.click -> linkboxChooseLaboratoryTest(0).click) and page object LabTestsCommodityTestPage.ts:6-16

fields.name: laboratory-test-name
fields.label: Search
fields.requiredEvidence: legacy: optional. The search filter schema declares Joi.string().allow('').max(255) — the empty string is explicitly permitted, so the field is NOT required (ipaffs-frontend-decision/service/src/validation/laboratory_tests_validation.js:17-19). This is a search filter, not a persisted notification-model field, so PartOne.java @NotNull groups do not apply.
fields.validationEvidence: legacy: a single max-length(255) rule. Over-length input yields the error 'must be 255 characters or less' (MAX_LENGTH_VALIDATION_MESSAGE(255) at ipaffs-frontend-decision/service/src/validation/validation_messages.js:8, wired for STRING_MAX at laboratory_tests_validation.js:17-19; label 'Search' per validation_constants.js:129). On this error payloadCleaner strips the criterion and the results table renders the empty state (choose_lab_test.js:34-35; handler test choose_lab_test_test.js:207-213).
fields.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 126 (id=laboratory-test-name); trace b3742f19b6eea5d9285f5c8739571523a0a13ec1 action 131. Corroborated by page object LabTestsCommodityTestPage.ts:6-8 (inputSearch); the CHED-D decision workflow fills labTest.macrolides ('.MACROLIDES') at ched-d-workflows.ts:420. candidateValues are the full lab-test lookup set defined in types/lab-test.ts:1-7 (only .MACROLIDES is exercised in the CHED-D flow). Legacy template id/name confirmed at chooseLabTest.html:34-37.

fields.name: laboratory-tests-category
fields.label: Laboratory test category
fields.conditionalOn: always shown. TRACE-ONLY: no page object or test ever selects this control (LabTestsCommodityTestPage.ts drives only inputSearch + btnSearch + the per-row Select link). The filter selects are rendered but unexercised by the QA suite, so their exact behaviour is unverified by tests.
fields.requiredEvidence: legacy: optional. Declared Joi.any() in the search schema — no validation, no requiredness (ipaffs-frontend-decision/service/src/validation/laboratory_tests_validation.js:20). A search filter, not a model field; PartOne.java @NotNull does not apply.
fields.optionsSource: legacy: the category list is reference data fetched at request time from laboratoriesService.getLaboratoryTestsCategories (choose_lab_test.js:92, template each over laboratoryTestsCategories at chooseLabTest.html:45-47), NOT a hardcoded enum. The leading blank option value='' renders 'Select category' (chooseLabTest.html:44). The new app should source it from a reference-data service.
fields.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 126; legacy control confirmed at chooseLabTest.html:42-48 (id=laboratory-tests-category).

fields.name: laboratory-tests-subcategory
fields.label: Laboratory test subcategory
options: A.1. Stilbenes,stilbene derivatives, and their salts and esters
A.4. Resorcylic acid lactones including zeranol
A.6. Compounds included in Annex IV to Council Regulation (EEC) No 2377/90 of June 1990
B.1. Antibacterial substances, including sulphonomides, quinolones
fields.conditionalOn: always shown; subcategory list is reference data — the new app should source it from a reference-data service, not hardcode. Category/subcategory are likely intended to cascade but the full 45-item subcategory list was rendered independent of category selection in the observed (unfiltered) state. TRACE-ONLY: no page object or test drives this control; behaviour unverified by the QA suite.
fields.requiredEvidence: legacy: optional. Declared Joi.any() in the search schema — no validation, no requiredness (ipaffs-frontend-decision/service/src/validation/laboratory_tests_validation.js:21). A search filter, not a model field; PartOne.java @NotNull does not apply.
fields.optionsSource: legacy: the subcategory list is reference data fetched at request time from laboratoriesService.getLaboratoryTestsSubcategories (choose_lab_test.js:93, template each over laboratoryTestsSubcategories at chooseLabTest.html:56-58), NOT a hardcoded enum. The leading blank option value='' renders 'Select subcategory' (chooseLabTest.html:55). LEGACY FINDING on cascade: the handler passes category and subcategory to the backend search independently (getSearchParameters at choose_lab_test.js:70-73) and re-renders the FULL subcategory list every request regardless of the selected category — there is no server- or client-side narrowing of subcategory by category in the legacy code, matching the observed unfiltered trace.
fields.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 126; legacy control confirmed at chooseLabTest.html:53-59 (id=laboratory-tests-subcategory).

fields.name: choose-laboratory-test-{n}
fields.label: Select
fields.conditionalOn: one link per matching result row in the results table; clicking it navigates to /decision/.../lab-test/{commodityComplementIndex}/{laboratoryTest.id}/applicant-information?source={source}. LEGACY: id is choose-laboratory-test-{@index} (0-based within the current page of results), href built at chooseLabTest.html:84. No 'you must choose a test' validation exists — selection IS navigation (a plain GET link), so there is no server-side error surface for not choosing.
fields.evidence: trace b3742f19b6eea5d9285f5c8739571523a0a13ec1 action 133 (Click #choose-laboratory-test-0, href .../lab-test/0/1541/applicant-information). Corroborated by page object LabTestsCommodityTestPage.ts:14-16 (linkboxChooseLaboratoryTest(index) = locator('#choose-laboratory-test-' + index)) and the workflow clicking index 0 at ched-d-workflows.ts:422. NB: control corrected from 'autocomplete' to 'link' — rendered reality (govuk-link) and the page-object locator both confirm it is a per-row anchor, not an autocomplete.

validationMessages.evidence: ipaffs-frontend-decision/service/src/validation/laboratory_tests_validation.js:17-19 (Joi.string().allow('').max(255).messages({'string.max': MAX_LENGTH_VALIDATION_MESSAGE(255)})); message string at validation_messages.js:8 ('must be ${maxLength} characters or less'); STRING_MAX = 'string.max' at error_types.js:15; field label 'Search' at validation_constants.js:129. This is the ONLY validation message on the page. On error the criterion is stripped and the empty-state 'No laboratory tests have been found.' renders (choose_lab_test.js:34-35; handler test choose_lab_test_test.js:207-213). No trace rendered this message.

openQuestions: RESOLVED (legacy): the page has exactly ONE validation message — 'must be 255 characters or less' on the Search box (laboratory-test-name), from a Joi max(255) rule (laboratory_tests_validation.js:17-19). Category/subcategory are Joi.any() (no validation). Confirmed there is NO 'you must choose a laboratory test' error surface: selection is a per-row GET link, not a form submit, so nothing validates the choice server-side. The rebuild inherits: validate only the search length; there is no mandatory selection on this page.

DISCREPANCY (legacy vs confirmed — for Reconcile): the trace-derived structure/govukComponents describe the 'Cancel' link as going 'back to the CHED hub' unconditionally. Legacy shows the Cancel destination is CONDITIONAL on the source query param — source='notests' -> /protected/bip-notifications/{ref}/hub, otherwise -> /protected/bip-notifications/{ref}/lab-test/lab-tests-to-be-performed (chooseLabTest.html:97-101). Rendered reality (a single observed Cancel) is kept; the divergence is the finding — Cancel is not always the hub.

DISCREPANCY (legacy vs confirmed — for Reconcile): the 'Commodity to be tested' body was observed as just the code '10064000'. Legacy renders '{{commodityID}} {{speciesName}}' (chooseLabTest.html:25) — code AND species name. The rendered value is kept ('confirmed'); the trace notification simply had an empty speciesName. The rebuild should render species alongside the code when present.

LEGACY (empty state): the results table has an else branch 'No laboratory tests have been found.' (chooseLabTest.html:87-90) shown on zero matches or after a failed search-length validation. No trace rendered it; captured in legacyBodyCopy.

FINDING (trace-only surface): the category and subcategory SELECT filters are rendered but no page object or test ever exercises them — the QA suite filters solely via the free-text Search box (LabTestsCommodityTestPage.ts exposes only inputSearch, btnSearch and the row Select link). The rebuild should question whether the two cascading selects earn their place, or whether a single search box (as the automation treats it) is the real requirement.

Do the category and subcategory selects cascade (subcategory narrowed by category)? In the observed unfiltered state the full 45-item subcategory list rendered regardless of category. Unclear whether category is a server-side filter, a client-side cascade, or both. Untestable from the QA suite (see finding above).
The commodity code shown ('10064000') and the H1 CHED reference/version are dynamic context, not user input on this page — sourced from the notification. Confirmed as display-only.
Unfiltered catalogue spans 114 pages of ~27 rows; this is reference data (laboratory test catalogue with category + subcategory taxonomy). The new app should source it from a reference-data service.

This page belongs to the DECISION / BCP-inspector phase, not the notifier journey (hence journey position -1). It is reached via recordDecisionForChedDNotification (ched-d-workflows.ts:410-422) after Identity & Physical Checks, and is followed by the Commodity Sample page. Only exercised when the inspector answers 'Yes' on the Lab Tests intro page (labTestsIntro.radioYes).
Both evidence pointers (eddc6f6 action 126, b3742f1 action 131) landed correctly on this page — the '.MACROLIDES' fill on the Search box (id laboratory-test-name).
